roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:64 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  25  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:07-14-14 /X:THE COURT ORDERS THESHERRIFF TO TRANSPORT THE PAROLEE TO A PROGRAM AS DIRECTED BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
